generated_oml:
instance WheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Automotive wheel component of the vehicle"
]

instance ChassisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural chassis of the vehicle"
]

instance StructuralElementComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural elements comprising the vehicle framework"
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains WheelComponent, ChassisComponent, StructuralElementComponent
]

instance WheelSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring wheel rotation speed for movement dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WheelSpeedData
]

instance ChassisStrainSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring strain forces on vehicle chassis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChassisStrainData
]

instance WheelSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WheelSpeedSensor
]

instance ChassisStrainData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChassisStrainSensor
]

instance WheelSpeedDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wheel speed data collected from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WheelSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, SupervisoryController, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SimulationEnabler
]

instance ChassisStrainDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time chassis strain data collected from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ChassisStrainData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, SupervisoryController, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SimulationEnabler
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric representation of the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, SupervisoryController, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SimulationEnabler
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equation-based model for vehicle dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, SupervisoryController, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SimulationEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model for system physics including force interactions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetector, SupervisoryController, StateEstimator, Optimizer, SimulationEnabler
]

instance FaultDetector : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm detecting anomalies in vehicle behavior using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm managing supervisory control mechanisms for system safety"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance StateEstimator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm estimating current system state using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance Optimizer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Algorithm optimizing vehicle performance parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for running predictive simulations using geometric, behavioral, and analytical models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based prediction of Physical Twin behavior under current conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedBehaviorInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance of the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemSafetyStatusInsight, CorrectiveAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for detecting faults in vehicle operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for estimating the current state of the vehicle system"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimatedInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for optimizing vehicle performance parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationResultInsight
]

instance PredictedBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted behavior of the vehicle under current conditions"
]

instance SystemSafetyStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time assessment of vehicle safety parameters"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of anomalies in vehicle behavior indicating potential faults"
]

instance StateEstimatedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the vehicle system"
]

instance OptimizationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized parameters for vehicle performance"
]

instance CorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment to Physical Twin to correct performance violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
